title: U.S. Representatives Urge Senate to Vote on CLARITY Act in July, Address Ethics Concerns
summary: Rep. French Hill urged the Senate to vote on the CLARITY Act before the August recess, arguing the bill would establish a transparent crypto market framework that addresses ethics concerns surrounding President Trump's digital asset ventures.
body:
U.S. Representatives are calling on the Senate to vote on the CLARITY Act before the August recess. Rep. French Hill urged the Senate to act swiftly, arguing the bill would establish a transparent crypto market framework that addresses ethics concerns surrounding President Trump's digital asset ventures.

The CLARITY Act is designed to provide clear regulations for the crypto market, ensuring transparency and ethical practices. This push comes amid growing scrutiny over President Trump's involvement in digital assets.

The bill could significantly impact everyday crypto users by providing a clear regulatory framework, reducing uncertainty and potential ethical issues in the market, making it safer for investors and users alike.

For those interested in the future of crypto regulation, keeping an eye on the Senate's schedule is crucial. If passed, the CLARITY Act could set new standards for transparency and ethics in the digital asset market. Read more → https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/u-s-house-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act
twitterThread: Rep. French Hill urged the Senate to vote on the CLARITY Act before the August recess, arguing it would establish a transparent crypto market framework that addresses ethics concerns around Trump's digital assets.
The bill aims to create a transparent framework for the crypto market, ensuring ethical practices and reducing uncertainty for investors.

If passed, the CLARITY Act could set new standards for transparency in crypto. Watch for Senate action this month → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-10-us-lawmakers-push-for-july-vote-on-clarity-act-to-regulate-crypto-market
